llmResponse.agenda_changes: Add vision and mission equity carryover discussion to after 9.1 (becomes 9.1B). Move items 11.1 and 11.2 to consent agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? Oh, and just as a reminder, this includes 11.1 and 11.2
